positive: A stylized, central composition featuring a whimsical, bioluminescent forest scene at twilight. The main subject is a grouping of interconnected, glowing flora (mushrooms, vines, ferns) and ethereal fauna (small, glowing sprites, gentle forest spirits). Use strong silhouettes against a gradient sky of deep indigo and turquoise. The art style must be modern psychedelic botanical illustration with crisp vector line work and deep saturation. Focus on high contrast areas where bioluminescence interacts with shadow. Perfect for repeating textile patterns or central apparel graphic. Composition should be symmetrical and balanced. --ar 1:1
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, poorly drawn, cartoon, photographic, realistic, messy
